_README: Copy to jail.config.json (gitignored); /intake fills it. The engine reads the instance, never this template. comp.*_base are in thousands. location.arrangements ratings use the vocabulary: preferred | ok | stretch | no | null (unknown). location.relocate uses: never | exceptional | yes | null. lanes mirror the profile's priority lanes as {id, name, priority}. archive.current_year_path is the ONE explicit folder the rankings workbook links to for 'Submitted Applications' — set it to your actual current submitted-applications folder (e.g. this year's subfolder under archive.path); the workbook never scans for it or guesses a 'latest' folder, so update this value yourself when you start a new year/period. location.city_priority is an ORDERED list of your preferred cities (short form, e.g. ['NYC','SF']) — when a posting offers a choice of multiple office cities, the vetter lists them in THIS priority order first (any other named cities follow, in the order the posting listed them). Leave empty ([]) if you have no city preference beyond home_metro.
